description: Machine-readable recurring documentation review sets for strategy repo planning material. Human-readable policy source: strategy/documentation-update-dependency-model.md.

eventTypes.description: Product framing, scope, or durable thesis wording is clarified.

defaultTargets.reason: Boundary clarifications can alter the top-level strategic framing.
Boundary clarifications can change execution framing and sequencing assumptions.
Boundary clarifications can invalidate backlog lane wording.

thresholds: Update only when current strategic boundaries or reusable positioning language changed.
Do not update for local prose cleanup that leaves the boundary unchanged.

eventTypes.description: A decision changes ownership or boundaries between strategy and workspace repos.

defaultTargets.reason: Boundary decisions can alter private planning workflow policy.
Repo-boundary changes can alter execution ownership assumptions.
Repo-boundary changes can alter planning lane placement.

thresholds: Update only when ownership, repository boundary, or execution handoff changed.
Do not update for implementation details inside an unchanged boundary.

eventTypes.description: Implementation shifts in either repo change private planning assumptions or reusable strategic claims.

defaultTargets.reason: Implementation changes can invalidate current execution assumptions.
Implementation changes can obsolete pending planning lanes.
Implementation changes can affect derivative investor-facing framing.

thresholds: Update only when current planning assumptions or derivative narrative claims become misleading.
Do not update for internal refactors that leave strategic assumptions unchanged.

eventTypes.description: A durable term is introduced, renamed, narrowed, or corrected in strategy materials.

defaultTargets.reason: Durable vocabulary changes should be captured in the glossary.
Core strategy language should stay aligned with glossary terms.
Derivative materials should stay aligned with authoritative terms.

thresholds: Update only when terminology affects cross-note comprehension or durable framing.
Do not update for one-off wording choices without durable meaning.

eventTypes.description: External-network or fundraising signals materially change reusable strategy theses.

defaultTargets.reason: Learning can alter relationship capture and follow-up workflow assumptions.
Learning can alter feedback loops and qualification plans.
Learning can create new planning lanes or obsolete existing ones.

thresholds: Update only when reusable thesis-level implications changed.
Do not update for isolated contact notes without durable cross-slice impact.
